airplane: jet engines under the wings or on the tail
propellers if it's a propeller plane.
automobile: a car body, which can come in various colors and designs.
bird: can be in a variety of colors
often seen in trees, on power lines, or in the sky.
cat: round eyes, often green or yellow
variety of colors and patterns, including solid, striped, and spotted.
deer: white spots or patches (on some species)
dog: fur in various colors and lengths
tail, which can be long, short, curly, or straight
ears, which can be floppy or erect
various sizes, from small to large
distinctive breeds have unique features, such as a bulldog's wrinkled face or a dachshund's long body and short legs.
frog: green, brown, or sometimes brightly colored skin
long, strong hind legs for jumping
horse: a large head with a long snout
a mane and tail, often long and flowing
can be various colors, including brown, black, white, and grey.
ship: a hull (bottom part of the ship)
a mast and sails (for sailing ships)
a propeller at the back (for motorized ships)
may have a flag or company logo.
truck: front cab with one or two rows of seats
may have a company logo or name on the side.
